notes: Core mechanics work (movement, shooting, enemies, lives, score) but entrance paths are broken (enemies reference undefined array during generation), dive behavior is simplistic, no tractor beam/capture mechanic, and enemy sprites are basic geometric shapes rather than authentic Galaga sprites.

The game runs and is controllable, but it is only a loose Galaga-like with simplified visuals, inaccurate enemy behavior/formation logic, and several gameplay shortcomings that keep it from feeling complete.
